heroSub: Hand-pressed, flame-grilled, and stacked to order.
introText: Every patty is hand-pressed and seared over an open flame the second you order it. Fresh produce, toasted brioche, and cheese that actually melts. That's the whole trick — we just refuse to cut corners.
featuredText: Six builds we'd put our name on. Start here, then make it yours.
drinksText: Thick hand-spun shakes, fresh-squeezed lemonade, and an ice-cold cola — finish it however you like.
comboText: Burger, a basket of golden fries, and an ice-cold drink. Everything you came for, on one tray.
ctaTitle: Grab a table. We'll bring the fire.
ctaText: Dine in, order from your seat, and we'll do the rest — no app, no line.
